### Summary

Describe the change and its impact.

### Checks

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests updated
- [ ] Security tests updated (injections/auth/headers)
- [ ] SBOM generated & attached (artifact)
- [ ] SCA/DAST deltas reviewed; acceptable per SOP
- [ ] Secrets policy unaffected or updated (JWT ≥ 32 chars in prod)

### Risk & Rollout

- [ ] Feature flags updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Rollback plan documented
